speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Science and Tomorrow, and today we're talking big picture energy. <cite index="36-5,36-6,36-7">Fortescue is accelerating development of a large-scale off-grid renewable energy network combining solar, wind and multi-gigawatt battery storage, creating the largest system of its kind dedicated to decarbonizing major industry around the clock</cite>.

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] <cite index="32-21,32-22,32-23">The federal government's Cheaper Home Batteries Program has already supported the installation of around 300,000 home batteries in less than a year</cite>. That's not just impressive, that's game-changing for how we store and use power across the country.

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] With all this renewable energy flying around, pretty soon we'll have more power than a Sunday arvo barbecue. Science making life better, one breakthrough at a time.
